notes: Works when selecting windowed mode. Only played the very beginning about ~10 minutes. Performance was perfect, no stuttering or audio issues. Marking as Gold for windowed-only mode, fullscreen gives an unresponsive window that must be force-closed. The option to select resolution, windowed/fullscreen and display monitor is given upon launching the game, so very easy to change.
title: Lost in Vivo

notes: You have to run it in windowed mode, works flawlessly otherwise
title: Lost in Vivo

notes: The game runs only on windowed mode using proton 3.7.8 but the framerate is really low, and if you try to switch it to 'potatoe mode' the game runs on a really small window, making it unplayable. And Proton 3.16.4 won't even start the game
title: Lost in Vivo
